headline: 'Why Hold Robinhood Over Gold?': Helius CEO Mert Mumtaz Brushes Off SOL Vs ZEC Narrative Debate
summary: A user inquired why Solana over Zcash, which has risen more than 1,054% in a year amid increasing privacy-coin interest and a reported Multicoin Capital investment.

raw.headline: 'Why Hold Robinhood Over Gold?': Helius CEO Mert Mumtaz Brushes Off SOL Vs ZEC Narrative Debate

headline: Wall Street Wants To Tokenize Everything—But It First Needs The CLARITY Act
summary: Blockchain was supposed to put Wall Street’s middlemen out of business. Instead, the middlemen are racing to build it. BlackRock, Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase have rolled out tokenization projects over the past year, and brokerages Robinhood Markets and Kraken already sell tokenized US stocks to overseas customers, according to Bloomberg. The appeal is real. Tokenized assets trade around the clock and can be lent out or posted as collateral, freeing up capital that sits idle today. The catch

headline: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.

raw.headline: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
